captions: The man has short, dark hair and wears khaki pants with an oversized grey hoodie. His black backpack hangs from one shoulder.
A man wearing a gray, hooded jacket, a pair of wrinkled brown pants, a gray backpack and a pair of dark colored shoes.
A man with a gray hoodie, book bag, and khaki pants is walking down a ramp.
The man has on dark tennis shoes.  He's wearing a grey jacket over darker khaki pants.  He's approaching some steps and is looking down.
The man is wearing a grey hooded sweater, brown pants, and black sneakers with white edges. His left foot is raised, and he is carrying a black-blue backpack on his right shoulder.
This person wears tan pants and a loose grey hoodie.  He has a black bag on his right shoulder.
Man wearing a grey jacket, brown pants and black shoes wearing a black backpack over his right shoulder
This person is a male who is wearing a gray hoodie, brown pants, and shoes.  He is also carrying a black backpack.
